title: 10 best herbal tinctures for hematuria
description: Goldenseal tinctures helps with hematuria because its active compound, berberine, has potent anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Berberine binds to the mucous membranes in the urinary tract, reducing inflammation and preventing bacterial adhesion, which can contribute to the condition. Additionally, berberine's antibacterial effects help combat underlying infections that may be causing hematuria. By addressing these underlying causes, goldenseal tinctures can provide relief...
